# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the public-safe change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `python3 src/claimcontractbench.py doctor`
- [ ] `python3 src/claimcontractbench.py smoke`
- [ ] Relevant runner from `docs/REPORT_INDEX.md`, if applicable:

## Public-Safety Checklist

- [ ] No confidential paper text or private review notes are included.
- [ ] No raw third-party datasets are included.
- [ ] No credentials, private links, or local absolute paths are included.
- [ ] Manifest rows were updated if the release surface changed.
- [ ] Documentation was updated for user-facing commands, outputs, or files.
- [ ] New claim families use the typed template-admission path.
